mapper.update: update kh_articles_feed set title = #{title,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, lang = #{lang,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, resource_type = #{resourceType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, disease_id = #{diseaseId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, drug_id = #{drugId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, article_tag = #{articleTag,jdbcType=INTEGER}, create_type = #{createType,jdbcType=SMALLINT}, creator_id = #{creatorId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, source_url = #{sourceUrl,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, create_time = #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
mapper.select: select id, title, lang, resource_type, disease_id, drug_id, article_tag, create_type, creator_id, source_url, create_time, update_time from kh_articles_feed where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
select id, title, lang, resource_type, disease_id, drug_id, article_tag, create_type, creator_id, source_url, create_time, update_time from kh_articles_feed
